Overnight macro articles:
- [US Top News and Analysis] Vance says 'the ball is in Iran's court' to move peace talks further, as U.S. blockade takes effect: The U.S. team of Vance and special envoys Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner made progress with Iran during the Islamabad talks, the vice president said.
- [US Top News and Analysis] Fed nominee Warsh clears a hurdle to Senate hearing: Kevin Warsh submitted required ethics paperwork to the Senate Monday.
- [US Top News and Analysis] Oil prices near $100 as U.S. Navy blockades Iran's ports after peace talks fail: The blockade took effect Monday at 10 a.m. ET. U.S. Central Command said it will not impede vessels transiting to and from non-Iranian ports.
- [US Top News and Analysis] Trump deletes Truth Social image depicting him as Jesus: 'It was me as a doctor': President Donald Trump in May 2025 posted an apparent AI image depicting himself as a Catholic pope after the death of Pope Francis.
- [US Top News and Analysis] Asia markets open higher amid hopes of a U.S.-Iran deal; China trade data in focus: Asia-Pacific markets open higher Tuesday, amid positive investor sentiment that a deal between the U.S. and Iran is still possible
- [US Top News and Analysis] Oracle expands Bloom Energy deal days after receiving $400 million stock warrant: Last week Oracle received a warrant to buy nearly $400 million in Bloom Energy's stock, which jumped on Monday after the companies announced an expanded deal.
- [US Top News and Analysis] Rep. Eric Swalwell resigns from U.S. House after sexual misconduct allegations: Rep. Eric Swalwell was a leading candidate for California governor but faced growing calls to resign after allegations of sexual misconduct were published last week.
- [US Top News and Analysis] Oracle pops nearly 13%, leading bounce back rally in software stocks: Oracle has lost more than a fifth of its value this year on AI disruption concerns.
- [US Top News and Analysis] Delta Air Lines unveils first new Delta One suite in premium cabin arms race: Delta and other carriers are ramping up premium seats on board.
- [US Top News and Analysis] The Iran war is compounding California's energy crunch: While the United States leans into its domestic crude oil production, one state is being left out to dry, California.
